description: Screenshot of a Department of Labor news release on a plain white background, with no graphic elements beyond typography. Black text reads 'News Release' (small bold) above a large bold serif headline 'US DEPARTMENT OF LABOR AWARDS $4M TO CONTINUE DISASTER-RELIEF JOBS FOR MISSOURI RESIDENTS AFFECTED BY MULTIPLE SEVERE STORMS' and an italic subhead 'Funding also supports recovery efforts for May 2025 storms.' There are no photos, seals, illustrations, or color accents. The tweet adds 'We'll always take care of the American Worker.'
notable_text: US DEPARTMENT OF LABOR AWARDS $4M TO CONTINUE DISASTER-RELIEF JOBS FOR MISSOURI RESIDENTS AFFECTED BY MULTIPLE SEVERE STORMS; Funding also supports recovery efforts for May 2025 storms
